---
title: "backup_sequence_steps.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\.agents\skills\drafts\workflow_backup_sequence_steps_gen\backup_sequence_steps.py"
loc: 10
complexity: 2
logic_score: 6.67
style_score: 3.71
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.15
---

## Intent
The `backup_sequence_steps.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on main. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)

### Exports
- `main`
